message:
Fix Gemini google_search + functionDeclarations incompatibility, add integration tests

Gemini API does not support google_search combined with functionDeclarations.
Skip google_search when function tools are present. Add real API integration
tests for web search on all three providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
